search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switchportsoverview" $orgid$ | rename counts.total as "Total Ports", counts.byStatus.active.total as "Active Ports", counts.byStatus.inactive.total as "Inactive Ports", counts.byStatus.active.byMediaAndLinkSpeed.rj45.total as "Active RJ45", counts.byStatus.active.byMediaAndLinkSpeed.sfp.total as "Active SFP", counts.byStatus.inactive.byMedia.rj45.total as "Inactive RJ45", counts.byStatus.inactive.byMedia.sfp.total as "Inactive SFP" | table "Total Ports", "Active Ports", "Inactive Ports", "Active RJ45", "Active SFP", "Inactive RJ45", "Inactive SFP"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:switchportsoverview" $orgid$ counts.total="$row.Total Ports$" counts.byStatus.active.total="$row.Active Ports$" counts.byStatus.inactive.total="$row.Inactive Ports$" counts.byStatus.active.byMediaAndLinkSpeed.rj45.total="$row.Active RJ45$" counts.byStatus.active.byMediaAndLinkSpeed.sfp.total="$row.Active SFP$" counts.byStatus.inactive.byMedia.rj45.total="$row.Inactive RJ45$" counts.byStatus.inactive.byMedia.sfp.total="$row.Inactive SFP$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
